notes: Solid, well-implemented Snake with input queue, speed scaling, audio, and proper collision detection including the tail-skip optimization; minor visual simplicity (no grid lines, basic shapes) keeps it from a perfect score.
An exceptionally well-crafted Snake game with flawless input queueing, elegant logic, nice visual touches, and synthesized audio.
A solid and mostly complete Snake build with responsive controls and no obvious code errors, but it lacks polish and has minor design limitations like simple visuals and no win/full-board handling.
